skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: A racing drone can fly at an average speed of 22 meters per second. At this rate, how many meters would the drone fly in 5 seconds?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. Distance = speed × time = 22 × 5 = 110 meters.

Choice A is incorrect; this is the sum of 22 and 5. Choice B is incorrect; this is the difference. Choice C is incorrect; this is the ratio of the two values.
